smg.text: Mainly cloudy. Showers. Showers will ease off later. Possible thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 5 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers later. Force 2 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 2 to 3 northerly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
